title: AI Low Poly 3D
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into stylized low-poly 3D art.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a stylized low-poly 3D portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial proportions, pose, camera angle, outfit color cues, and main composition. Rebuild the subject and background with clean geometric facets, sharp polygon edges, modern game-art lighting, vibrant depth, controlled simplification, and a polished professional 3D render finish. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: photorealistic, blurry, low quality, noisy render, changed identity, distorted geometry, broken mesh, deformed face, extra eyes, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, poor lighting, rendering artifacts, stretched polygons, pixelated, unfinished model, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. game character render, colorful facets...
